parameters.query: SELECT slug, name, description, icon, category, plugin_id, tags FROM sn_spokes ORDER BY category ASC, name ASC;

parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": true, "spokes": [], "count": 0, "message": "No spokes available yet. Database is being seeded." }

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO sn_spokes (slug, name, description, icon, category, plugin_id, tags, created_at)
SELECT
  item->>'slug',
  item->>'name',
  item->>'description',
  item->>'icon',
  item->>'category',
  item->>'plugin_id',
  ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(item->'tags')),
  NOW()
FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($json.spokes) }}'::jsonb) AS item
ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING;
